title: Onboarding - What's new screen - Updating from previous app version
scenario: "What's New" screen incorrectly displayed instead of "Welcome to Poly Studio" onboarding when updating app from pre-5.0.0.X to latest version
steps: 1. Install a previous version of the Poly Studio Mobile app (before 5.0.0.X) on the device.
2. Update the app to the latest version.
3. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app.
4. Observe the screen that appears after launch.
5. Tap the "Get Started" button on the "Welcome to Poly Studio" screen.
expected: The "Welcome to Poly Studio" screen is displayed after updating from a previous version. Tapping "Get Started" dismisses the screen and navigates the user to the Home Screen.
